text: CRP: 0.8 mg/L (Sep 15). Calprotectin: 120 ug/g (Sep 15). Stable remission.
New labs drawn Oct 2. Values posted to the airtable health log. CRP and calprotectin have changed from Sep 15 baseline.
Migraines this month: Oct 2 (moderate, took Sumatriptan), Oct 5 (mild, no meds), Oct 8 (moderate, took Sumatriptan).
Sumatriptan count: 3 this cycle so far. If reaches 5, discuss Aimovig with Dr. Park.
Humira 40mg: Biweekly Monday injection. Next: Oct 13. Shipment due Oct 12 from Optum. BUT Optum email says shifted to Oct 14.
Vyvanse 40mg: Daily morning. Paper Rx from Dr. Kim. Pickup window Oct 8-10 at CVS. Schedule II cannot be auto-refilled.
Sumatriptan 50mg: PRN for migraine. Current supply ~6 tablets.
Ba (Hung) meds: Eliquis 5mg twice daily (a-fib). NOW SWITCHING from Metoprolol 50mg to Diltiazem 180mg ER per Dr. Lam.
Johnston County Qualifier - Sep 28. Internal temp logged: 203F at pull. NOTE: actual thermometer read was 197F. Log entry may be wrong.
Pitmaster Classic - Nov 7. Registration confirmed. Conflicts with Saturday golf.
Slides: v1 (Sep 15), v2 (Sep 28), v3_FINAL (Oct 2). Marcus has write access to v3_FINAL.
Unreal Fest Oct 14-16 Orlando. Travel Oct 13 evening or Oct 14 morning. Humira shipment conflict on Oct 14.
Session 14 - Oct 4 at Arjun house. Thalia level 8. Shadow Blade + Extra Attack. Castle Ravenloft arc.
Declan may be late (deposition). Liam tentative for D&D (golf conflict resolved - golf is morning, D&D evening).
Chen rendering pipeline 2 weeks behind Nov 15 milestone. Impact on Dec 11 code freeze. Need resource plan.
